nasb.text: The Lord grant mercy to the house of Onesiphorus, for he often refreshed me and was not ashamed of my chains;

esv.text: May the Lord grant mercy to the household of Onesiphorus, for he often refreshed me and was not ashamed of my chains,

cnv.text: 願主賜憐憫給阿尼色弗一家的人，因為他多次使我暢快，也不以我的鎖鍊為恥；

ccb.text: 愿主怜悯阿尼色弗一家人，他常常鼓励我，不以我被囚禁为耻。

csbs.text: 愿主施怜悯给奥尼斯弗罗的家人，因为他多次使我神清气爽，也没有以我的锁链为耻；
